query:
CREATE TABLE `octane_customer_links` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`octaneCustomerId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`octaneCustomerName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`octaneServiceName` varchar(512) DEFAULT '',
	`internalCustomerExternalId` varchar(32),
	`internalCustomerName` varchar(512),
	`matchType` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'unmatched',
	`matchConfidence` decimal(4,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
	`matchNotes` text,
	`confirmedBy` varchar(256),
	`confirmedAt` timestamp,
	`isZambreroService` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`msisdn` varchar(32) DEFAULT '',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `octane_customer_links_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `uniq_octane_link` UNIQUE(`octaneCustomerId`,`octaneServiceName`)
);

CREATE TABLE `tiab_supplier_invoice_line_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceId` int NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`description` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`gstExclusive` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`gst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`amountGstIncl` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`taxId` varchar(16) DEFAULT 'GST',
	`lineCategory` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mobile_service',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoice_line_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `tiab_supplier_invoices` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`invoiceReference` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`accountNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`accountName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`invoiceDate` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`paymentDueDate` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billingMonth` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
	`supplierName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`supplierAbn` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billedToName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`billedToAbn` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billedToAddress` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`totalExGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalIncGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`paymentBsb` varchar(16) DEFAULT '032-002',
	`paymentAccount` varchar(32) DEFAULT '483217',
	`paymentEmail` varchar(320) DEFAULT 'finance@telcoinabox.com',
	`importedBy` varchar(256) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'system',
	`fileUrl` text,
	`fileName` varchar(256),
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'imported',
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoices_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoices_invoiceNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`invoiceNumber`)
);

CREATE TABLE `tiab_supplier_invoice_line_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceId` int NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`description` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`gstExclusive` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`gst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`amountGstIncl` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`taxId` varchar(16) DEFAULT 'GST',
	`lineCategory` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mobile_service',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoice_line_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `tiab_supplier_invoices` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`invoiceReference` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`accountNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`accountName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`invoiceDate` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`paymentDueDate` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billingMonth` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
	`supplierName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`supplierAbn` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billedToName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`billedToAbn` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`billedToAddress` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`totalExGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalIncGst` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`paymentBsb` varchar(16) DEFAULT '032-002',
	`paymentAccount` varchar(32) DEFAULT '483217',
	`paymentEmail` varchar(320) DEFAULT 'finance@telcoinabox.com',
	`importedBy` varchar(256) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'system',
	`fileUrl` text,
	`fileName` varchar(256),
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'imported',
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoices_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_supplier_invoices_invoiceNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`invoiceNumber`)
);
